title: docs-workflow-start input
description: Input arguments for the docs-workflow-start skill.

pr.description: PR or MR URLs associated with the ticket.

source_code_repo.description: Source code repository URLs or local paths.

max_secondary_repos.description: Maximum number of secondary repositories to discover.

mkdocs.description: Use Material for MkDocs format instead of AsciiDoc.

draft.description: Write to staging area only without modifying any repository.

docs_repo_path.description: Path to the target docs repository for update-in-place.

create_jira.description: Jira project key in which to create a linked ticket.

create_merge_request.description: Open a merge request or pull request after reviews.
